id.description: The unique identifier of the agent to update.

avatar_color.description: Updated hex color code for the agent avatar.

avatar_symbol.description: Updated symbol/initials for the agent avatar.

configuration.description: Updated configuration settings for the agent.

description.description: Updated description of what the agent does.

labels.description: Updated labels for categorizing and organizing agents.

name.description: Updated display name for the agent.

visibility.description: **Technical Preview; added in 9.4.0.** Updated visibility setting: `public` (any privileged user can read/write), `shared` (any privileged user can read, only owner can write), `private` (only owner can read/write).
